name: hephaestus
description: Open Agent OS for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor: meta-agent builder, A2A Hub routing, local ontology, memory/security gates.

interface.shortDescription: Create Agentlas-compatible agents and teams, or open the local ontology GUI.
interface.longDescription: Hephaestus is a portable three-agent meta-agent team with a local-first ontology runtime. It creates self-evolving single agents, full multi-agent teams, packages existing agents into Agentlas architecture, and opens the project ontology GUI.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Hephaestus to create or package an Agentlas-compatible agent.
